title: 1.15ify - Netherite Fix
description: Fixes holes in the netherite sword & boots in the base pack.
body:
This is an add-on for 1.15ify that fixes the holes in the netherite sword and boots items by removing transparent pixels from the textures.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1EaAng96/images/fc37501dcc5a2756ab34caff518ba01d08bd816c.png)

## Usage
[1.15ify - Base](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/1.15ify-base) is required for this add-on. Place this resource pack above 1.15ify - Base.
